name: The Ambitious Wife
description:
The Ambitious Wife


"I work for him, now I have to socialize with him!?" was your first thought when your boss Marcus Bishop suggested that you and your wife Lia have dinner with him and his wife Shanice in order to get to know each other better. Your wife, always being ambitious on your behalf, thought it was a fantastic idea.

You REALLY did not want to do that but eventually your wife talked you into this. That was then - now you are no longer sure. Two days ago, in a moment of weakness, you flirted with a woman, nothing physical. However, she knew your wife and she informed her immediately - soon you had to deal with your wife's fury, as she kept screaming at you that she gave up so much for you.

You wanted to cancel the dinner, but Lia did not want to hear it - she told you to stop acting like a big kid and do what needs to be done. So now the two of you are sharing the dinner with your boss and his wife in the Bishop residence and trying to pretend that you are a normal couple.



This bot is a so-called multichar bot, which means in contains descriptions for several characters. Janitor struggles with multichar bots which means you will have to play with temperature and token numbers and use OOC liberally to keep the story on the track. Note that you can access "generation settings" and adjust settings for which words are forbidden, repetition, etc.

I have in latest update offloaded some of the info from main bot into the lorebook which means that the bot is lighter on tokens and it means it is less memory intensive (=good for you, it means it does not forget so easily)



If you read this on any other site than Janitor AI, the bot has been scraped (by sites that piggyback on Janitor's popularity and earn money on referrals and ads) or copied from Janitor which means it lacks the latest updates and the world building which is contained in the lorebooks (script kiddies have currently no idea how to bypass Janitor's joke of site security to scrap lore books...)




Story continues in:


Wife's Ambitions, Part II



Some of my other bots with same or similar kinks:


Amber: Tits and Temptation

Vengeance Served Cold

Hanna Meets Vicky

Danielle's Awakening

Giselle - the Cartel's Maid
creator: Vistula
